title: Fast-WAM: Do World Action Models Need Test-time Future Imagination?
abstract: World Action Models (WAMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for embodied control because they explicitly model how visual observations may evolve under action. Most existing WAMs follow an imagine-then-execute paradigm, incurring substantial test-time latency from iterative video denoising, yet it remains unclear whether explicit future imagination is actually necessary for strong action performance. In this paper, we ask whether WAMs need explicit future imagination at test time, or whether their benefit comes primarily from video modeling during training. We disentangle the role of video modeling during training from explicit future generation during inference by proposing \textbf{Fast-WAM}, a WAM architecture that retains video co-training during training but skips future prediction at test time. We further instantiate several Fast-WAM variants to enable a controlled comparison of these two factors. Across these variants, we find that Fast-WAM remains competitive with imagine-then-execute variants, while removing video co-training causes a much larger performance drop. Empirically, Fast-WAM achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art methods both on simulation benchmarks (LIBERO and RoboTwin) and real-world tasks, without embodied pretraining. It runs in real time with 190ms latency, over 4$\times$ faster than existing imagine-then-execute WAMs. These results suggest that the main value of video prediction in WAMs may lie in improving world representations during training rather than generating future observations at test time. Project page: https://yuantianyuan01.github.io/FastWAM/
summary:
# 论文总结：Fast-WAM: Do World Action Models Need Test-time Future Imagination?

## 1. 核心创新点

本文最关键的创新是把 WAM 的两种作用彻底拆开：保留训练阶段的视频共训练，但在推理阶段不再显式生成未来帧，而是直接从单次前向得到的 latent world representation 输出动作。作者借此回答了一个核心问题：在他们的设定里，WAM 的主要收益更可能来自训练时学到的世界表征，而不是测试时真的把未来想象出来。

## 2. 技术创新拆解

- **训练/推理解耦**：Fast-WAM 在训练时保留 video co-training，推理时完全跳过 future video denoising，直接做 action chunk prediction。这个设计把“世界建模是否有用”与“是否必须在测试时想象未来”分开，显著降低延迟。
- **MoT 世界表征架构**：模型用共享 attention 的 Mixture-of-Transformer 连接 video DiT 与 action expert DiT，以 clean first-frame latent 作为共享锚点；future noisy video token 只在训练时出现，action token 被禁止访问未来视频 token，避免信息泄漏。
- **受控变体与因果式消融**：作者构造了 Fast-WAM-Joint、Fast-WAM-IDM 和 no-video-co-train 版本，并尽量统一 backbone、tokenization 和训练 recipe。这样可以更干净地分离训练目标和推理路径的贡献，而不是依赖跨论文比较。

## 3. 方法论突破

- **新颖性**：与主流 imagine-then-execute WAM 的本质区别是，它把训练时视频共训练和测试时未来想象做成可切换变量，从而把一个容易混淆的架构争论变成可检验的 counterfactual 对照；推理时模型不再生成未来帧，而是直接从被 world-model 训练过的 latent state 读出动作。
- **关键技术**：核心技术是基于 Wan2.2-5B video DiT 的 MoT 结构：训练阶段对动作 token 和未来视频 latent 同时做 flow matching，推理阶段只保留首帧 latent 经过 video backbone 的单次编码，再由 action expert 解码动作。structured attention mask 是关键，它在训练时保留世界建模监督，在推理语义上切断 action 分支对未来视频 token 的依赖。
- **理论支撑**：文中没有新的理论证明、收敛分析或性能上界；主要是一个受控实证分解。作者用统一框架下的对照实验说明，视频共训练带来的表征收益显著大于测试时显式未来想象的边际收益。

## 4. 实验验证

- **主要基准/场景**：主要在 LIBERO（Spatial/Object/Goal/Long 四个子集）、RoboTwin 2.0（clean 与 randomized）、以及真实世界 towel-folding 任务上验证；真实任务使用 Galaxea R1 Lite 平台和 60 小时 teleoperation 数据。
- **性能提升**：RoboTwin 平均成功率 91.8%（clean 91.88 / rand 91.78），高于 Fast-WAM-Joint 90.6% 和 Fast-WAM-IDM 91.3%，并比 no-video-co-train 的 83.8% 高 8.0 个百分点；LIBERO 平均 97.6%，比 no-video-co-train 的 93.5% 高 4.1 个百分点，且接近最佳 pretrained baselines（LingBot-VA 98.5%，Motus 97.7%）。实时推理延迟为 190ms，对比文中 Fast-WAM-IDM 的 810ms 明显更快。真实 towel-folding 上，去掉 video co-training 后成功率仅 10%；completion time 的具体数值文中未清楚披露。
- **消融实验**：最关键的组件是 video co-training：去掉它带来最大退化，RoboTwin 从 91.8% 掉到 83.8%，LIBERO 从 97.6% 掉到 93.5%，真实任务也掉到 10% 成功率。相比之下，Fast-WAM 与 Joint/IDM 的差距只有约 0.4-1.2 个百分点，说明测试时显式 future imagination 的边际收益较小。

## 5. 局限与启发

- **当前局限**：方法依赖较强的预训练视频骨干（Wan2.2-5B）和较大的总模型规模（约 6B）；受控比较主要覆盖单个 action chunk，而不是更长的 outer autoregressive rollout；真实世界也只验证了 towel-folding 一类长时序操作任务。另一个现实限制是，它并未在所有设置下稳定压过最强 pretrained 系统，例如 LIBERO 上仍略低于 LingBot-VA 的 98.5%。
- **未来方向**：下一步值得研究更大规模预训练数据与模型 scaling 下，这种“训练期 world modeling + 推理期 direct policy”的分工是否仍成立，并检验在需要更强 planning 或反事实推演的任务上，显式 future imagination 是否会重新变得重要。
- **可迁移性**：可迁移性较强，尤其适合把视频预测当作表征正则而不是推理必需品的 video-conditioned policy、VLA、导航或驾驶场景；但如果任务本身强依赖测试时显式未来 rollout，直接跳过 imagination 可能不够。当前证据主要来自机器人操作。

## 6. 一句话总结

Fast-WAM 证明 WAM 的关键收益主要来自训练阶段的视频共训练所塑造的 world-grounded 表征，而不是测试时必须逐帧生成未来视频，因此可以用单次前向的直接策略接口把推理延迟降到 190ms，同时基本保持动作性能。

recognized_fields.title: Fast-WAM: Do World Action Models Need Test-time Future Imagination?
recognized_fields.abstract: World Action Models (WAMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for embodied control because they explicitly model how visual observations may evolve under action. Most existing WAMs follow an imagine-then-execute paradigm, incurring substantial test-time latency from iterative video denoising, yet it remains unclear whether explicit future imagination is actually necessary for strong action performance. In this paper, we ask whether WAMs need explicit future imagination at test time, or whether their benefit comes primarily from video modeling during training. We disentangle the role of video modeling during training from explicit future generation during inference by proposing \textbf{Fast-WAM}, a WAM architecture that retains video co-training during training but skips future prediction at test time. We further instantiate several Fast-WAM variants to enable a controlled comparison of these two factors. Across these variants, we find that Fast-WAM remains competitive with imagine-then-execute variants, while removing video co-training causes a much larger performance drop. Empirically, Fast-WAM achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art methods both on simulation benchmarks (LIBERO and RoboTwin) and real-world tasks, without embodied pretraining. It runs in real time with 190ms latency, over 4$\times$ faster than existing imagine-then-execute WAMs. These results suggest that the main value of video prediction in WAMs may lie in improving world representations during training rather than generating future observations at test time. Project page: https://yuantianyuan01.github.io/FastWAM/
